hypothesis: If a delta-learning XGBoost model is trained to predict the difference between GFN1-xTB and DFT band gaps for MOFs using the Stoichiometric-135, RACs, and APRDF descriptors, then it will predict DFT band gaps more accurately than a direct XGBoost model predicting DFT band gaps, because it explicitly models and corrects the systematic discrepancy between GFN1-xTB and DFT calculations.
